HBT Engineering provides end-to-end
automation and industrial software development services
for OEMs, industrial equipment manufacturers, and digital manufacturing platforms.
Our teams support the complete technology stack — from

embedded firmware and control systems to industrial software platforms, testing automation, and hardware integration
. We help organizations accelerate product development, modernize industrial systems, and deploy reliable automation solutions at scale.

Engineering Excellence for Industrial Innovation.
Engineering
Services
Click here
Engineering
Services

HBT Engineering provides comprehensive engineering services supporting the design, development, and validation of complex industrial systems. Our multidisciplinary teams combine expertise across mechanical engineering, hydraulics, gearbox design, electrical systems, system integration, and virtual validation to deliver robust engineering solutions. These services support customers across the entire product lifecycle — from concept design to production readiness. The company’s global engineering
readiness. The company’s global engineering expertise is built on nearly 200 years of industrial engineering heritage originating from Luenen, Germany.

Engineering-Driven Lifecycle Support
Strategic
product support
Click here
Engineering-Driven
Strategic Sourcing
Modern industrial equipment requires long lifecycle support, reliable spare parts management, and engineering continuity across multiple global locations.
At HBT Engineering India, our Product Support Services combine engineering expertise, data-driven decision making, and supply chain coordination to ensure seamless lifecycle support for complex industrial systems.

Our teams support global OEM operations through services including:
Spare parts pricing and inventory optimization
Warranty and product health analysis
Technical documentation and publications
SAP-enabled product support operations
These capabilities ensure higher equipment availability, better lifecycle profitability, and improved customer satisfaction.

Engineering-Driven Strategic Sourcing
Strategic
sourcing
Click here
Engineering-Driven
Strategic Sourcing
At HBT Engineering India, strategic sourcing goes beyond supplier discovery. We combine engineering expertise, supplier intelligence, and end-to-end execution ownership to build resilient and cost-efficient supply chains for complex industrial components.

With nearly 200 years of industrial heritage originating from Luenen, Germany, HBT brings deep manufacturing expertise and applies it to modern global sourcing strategies.
Our sourcing teams work closely with global customers to support:
Cost localization initiatives
Supplier capability assessment
Engineering collaboration for manufacturability
End-to-end procurement execution
Our Strategic Sourcing Capabilities
Supplier Discovery & Capability Assessment

Supplier Discovery & Capability Assessment
Identify and qualify suppliers based on technical capability, quality systems, and manufacturing readiness.

Advancing Industry

Technology
Services
Click here
HBT Technology Services
HBT combines deep engineering expertise, industrial automation excellence, and data-driven innovation to help organizations build smarter, more efficient, and future-ready operations. We deliver end-to-end capabilities—from product engineering and embedded software to automation, data services, and lifecycle support—under one trusted partner.

Our approach blends real-world industry experience with scalable digital solutions to accelerate time-to-market and reduce operational risk. With a strong focus on quality, reliability, and long-term value creation, we help businesses optimize performance across the entire product and operational lifecycle. HBT is committed to delivering measurable impact, global standards, and sustainable growth for our customers.
Our Services will be as Mentioned Below

HBT Engineering
HBT [Hauhinco Bergbau Technik] subsidiaries and partner offices are strategically located in 15 countries including Australia, United States, China, Germany, India, Russia and headquartered in Luenen, Germany. It is a world class machine manufacturer and fully integrated single solution provider – specializing in systems and equipment for underground coal mining, Tunnelling, High Pressure Pumps, Control Systems, Drives & Motors.

HBT Engineering Private Limited, India is a company consisting of three primary departments that play a crucial role in supporting the Global HBT Group Business Technology services. These departments include Automation Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Global Product Support.

Engineering Knowledge Delivered with Clarity
Tech
Documentation
Click here
Engineering Knowledge Delivered with Clarity
Industrial equipment requires precise documentation to ensure safe operation, efficient maintenance, and compliance with global standards.
HBT Engineering transforms complex engineering information into clear, structured technical publications designed for multiple stakeholders including operators, service technicians, dealers, and product support teams.

Our documentation services support the entire product lifecycle — from product launch to long-term maintenance and service operations.
The documentation process
includes six key stages:
1. Analysis
Collaborating with engineering teams and stakeholders to gather product information and documentation requirements.
2. Designing
Developing templates, documentation standards, and style guides tailored to customer requirements.
3. Authoring

3. Authoring
Creating structured, accurate technical documentation aligned with engineering specifications.
4. Review
Performing multi-level validation including self-checks, SME reviews, and customer approvals.
5. Publishing
Delivering documentation in multiple formats such as digital manuals, print-ready documents, and online help systems.
6. Maintenance
Updating documentation based on product upgrades, engineering changes, and field feedback.
